data.title: GOFO Expands Italian Presence with a New Sorting Center in Rome, Strengthening Southern Network
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Rome, GOFO, a rapidly expanding last-mile delivery company known for its technology-driven services, revealed the opening of a new sorting center at Logistic Park Roma situated on Via di Salone. This new facility will serve as a key hub to enhance GOFO's distribution network across Italy.
